components.card: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(42,92,67,0.06)] border border-[#E4E6E3] p-6 overflow-hidden
components.button_primary: bg-[#2A5C43] text-white hover:bg-[#204633] rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-bold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F9F9F7] text-[#2A5C43] hover:bg-[#E4E6E3] rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-bold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.input_field: w-full bg-white border border-[#E4E6E3] rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8A9E88] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all
components.pill_tag: inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-[#E4E6E3] bg-white text-[#1A1A1A] font-medium text-sm data-[state=selected]:bg-[#2A5C43] data-[state=selected]:text-white data-[state=selected]:border-[#2A5C43] transition-colors
components.chat_bubble_user: bg-[#2A5C43] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[85%] self-end
components.chat_bubble_ai: bg-white border border-[#E4E6E3] text-[#1A1A1A] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 max-w-[85%] self-start shadow-sm
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E4E6E3] pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50 shadow-[0_-4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]
components.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E4E6E3]/50 pb-4 pt-safe px-6 flex justify-between items-center

home_dashboard.layout: Mobile-first vertical stack. Top glass header. Bento grid for stats. Vertical list for feature cards.
sections: Header: User greeting, Date, Mini avatar.
Hero Stats: Grid cols-2. Span 1 tall (Daily Goal Ring), Span 1 split horizontal (Water, Calories).
Feature Menu: 3 large horizontal cards. 1. Symptom Checker (Organic green icon), 2. Fitness Trainer (Terracotta icon), 3. AI Chat (Sage icon).
Search Bar: Large, pill-shaped, sticky top.
Body: Flex wrap container for popular symptom pill tags.
Action: Fixed bottom button 'Analyze Symptoms' over a gradient fade background to prevent cutting off text.

fitness_trainer.layout: Immersive workout view. Darker overlay if camera is on.
sections: Top: Exercise title and 'End Workout' ghost button.
Center: Massive rep counter (text-[120px] font-black tracking-tighter text-[#2A5C43]).
Bottom: Horizontal swiper (Cards) for exercise form tips.
Chat Area: Generous spacing between bubbles. Date stamps in small_label typography.
Input Area: Floating pill-shaped input docked above the keyboard/bottom tab, with a circular send/mic button.

motion.hover: Subtle transform -translate-y-[2px] and shadow elevation for cards.
motion.tap: scale-95 for all buttons and interactive cards (using framer-motion or CSS active state).
motion.page_transition: Slide in from right, fade out.

health_consult.description: Doctor consulting patient via video call on laptop

healthy_lifestyle.description: Smiling woman in a pink top holding a bowl of fresh salad with cherry tomatoes and greens indoors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI targeting a mobile web layout (PWA style) since Expo web/PWA is requested. Ensure all containers have a max-width (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto) for desktop viewing to simulate a mobile screen.
Use standard Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI as described in the Tech Stack.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Work Sans' for body text.
Ensure generous padding in cards (`p-6`). Use flat white surfaces with soft, ambient shadows, avoiding dark hard borders unless for specific form inputs.
In the AI Fitness Tracker screen, use massive typography (`text-[120px]`) for the rep counter to make it glanceable.
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="symptom-submit-button"`).
Strictly follow the color palette: Deep Forest Green (#2A5C43) as primary, Off-white (#F9F9F7) background.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the exact URLs provided in `image_urls`.
Include a Bottom Navigation bar pinned to the bottom of the screen with a glassmorphism effect (`bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl`).
